name: Arenita
desc: Tetris, but the pieces disintegrate into sand. Get same-colored grains to bridge both walls — then watch them explode. Built at 35,000 feet over the Atlantic, no wifi, pure delusion.

name: Gravitas
desc: Your ship drifts freely through space — you cannot steer directly. Click to drop gravity wells that bend your path around asteroids. Collect drift crystals for bonus points. Built in Croatia overlooking the sunset of Rovinj.

name: ENDLESS.EXE
desc: A procedurally generated racing game with no finish line. Dodge obstacles, collect power-ups, and watch the track twist faster than you can react. How long can you last?

name: GASLIGHTER.EXE
desc: Dodge the FRIENDS. They are definitely FRIENDS. Your score is increasing (this is good). Your health is 100% (do not verify). Survive long enough and the game will confess everything. Built at 2am in a Chicago hotel room staring at the ceiling.

name: TYPEDEAD
desc: Enemies march in from the right — type their words to kill them. Move with F and J (home row, always) while your fingers are busy with the word. Don't stop typing. Don't look at your hands.

name: CONQUEST
desc: Ultimate Tic Tac Toe, but winning any single board wins the whole game. Nine boards, neon explosions, glitch effects, and two players sharing a keyboard until someone has had enough.
